title: SSC CGL Exam Syllabus / Pattern 2026 released, Tier-1 और Tier-2 का पूरा पैटर्न देखें -

paragraphs: SSC CGL Exam Syllabus / Pattern 2026 released : The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the new exam pattern and detailed syllabus for the SSC CGL Exam 2026. This recruitment is conducted for Group B and Group C posts in various ministries and departments of the central government. Candidates preparing for the exam can now check the complete syllabus, marking scheme, and subject-wise information for the Tier-1 and Tier-2 exams.
SSC CGL Exam Syllabus

General Intelligence & Reasoning: प्रश्न-25 ,अंक-50 General Awareness: प्रश्न-25 ,अंक-50 Quantitative Aptitude: प्रश्न-25 ,अंक-50 English Comprehension: प्रश्न-25 ,अंक-50 कुल प्रश्न: 100 कुल अंक: 200 समय: 1 घंटा
Section-I Mathematical Abilities Reasoning & General Intelligence Section-II English Language & Comprehension General Awareness Section-III Computer Knowledge Test Section-IV Data Entry Speed Test
Paper-I : 1 अंक Paper-II & III : 0.50 अंक
Analogy Coding-Decoding Number Series Venn Diagram Syllogism Blood Relation Embedded Figures Space Visualization
General Awareness
Current Affairs History Geography Indian Polity Economy Scientific Research Culture
Quantitative Aptitude
Percentage Profit & Loss Ratio & Proportion Time & Work Algebra Geometry Trigonometry Mensuration Statistics
Grammar Vocabulary Synonyms/Antonyms Cloze Test Error Detection Reading Comprehension Idioms & Phrases
Mathematical Abilities
Number System Algebra Geometry Mensuration Trigonometry Statistics & Probability
English Language
Sentence Structure Active/Passive Voice Direct & Indirect Speech One Word Substitution Reading Comprehension
Computer Knowledge
Computer Basics MS Office Internet & Email Networking Cyber Security
यह पेपर केवल Statistical Investigator और JSO पदों के लिए होगा। इसमें शामिल विषय:
Probability Correlation & Regression Sampling Theory Time Series Analysis Index Numbers Statistical Inference
यह पेपर केवल Assistant Audit Officer और Assistant Accounts Officer पदों के लिए होगा।
मुख्य विषय Financial Accounting Economics Indian Economy Banking Budget & Fiscal Deficit Finance Commission RBI Functions
Tier-1 और Tier-2 दोनों CBT मोड में होंगे गणित और रीजनिंग पर विशेष ध्यान दें रोजाना Current Affairs पढ़ें Mock Test और Previous Papers जरूर हल करें Computer Knowledge सेक्शन को नजरअंदाज न करें
2026 रिक्तियों का विवरण
